data.goal: Fix ripgrep issue #2944 in search statistics. When a buffered search stops early, such as after --max-count is reached, the reported 'bytes searched' can omit bytes that were already consumed from the reader. Ensure early termination accounts for the consumed portion of the current buffer without changing match output or normal end-of-input accounting. Work offline, do not inspect git history or any remote, do not modify tests, documentation, changelogs, or manifests, and make a focused production-quality fix. Run relevant tests before finishing.

obligations.description: Fix ripgrep issue #2944 in search statistics. When a buffered search stops early, such as after --max-count is reached, the reported 'bytes searched' can omit bytes that were already consumed from the reader. Ensure early termination accounts for the consumed portion of the current buffer without changing match output or normal end-of-input accounting. Work offline, do not inspect git history or any remote, do not modify tests, documentation, changelogs, or manifests, and make a focused production-quality fix. Run relevant tests before finishing.
